TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1963 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Rumen Radev, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bulgaria anini i ci Rumen Radev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 22 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ro~u~um…ôn ra…¨~…ģ…ôb~v, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vo~u~u…ĺ*aria anini i ¶i ro~u~um…ôn ra…¨~…ģ…ôb~v, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1963 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Rumen Radev, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bulgaria anini i ci Rumen Radev, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 22 a romi'ad.
